CustomField.description: Records the date and time when the event was marked as closed. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically filled when the event is closed.
CustomField.label: Completion Date
